---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in the Gift Wrap extension or admin page
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: nurkamol
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / console output

If applicable, add screenshots or paste the browser console output.
Check the console for `[GiftWrap]` log messages — they show the extension state.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Shopify theme | e.g. Dawn 14.0 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 130 |
| Extension version | e.g. v6 (check `shopify.extension.toml`) |
| Store plan | e.g. Basic, Shopify, Advanced |

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem — e.g. does it only happen on mobile, on a specific product, or after a specific cart action?
